---
title: "AK-OOe-Pensionen-PN-23011"
# author: "Lukas Schmoigl / Stefan Weingärtner"
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include src/config.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5"
import {aq, op} from '@uwdata/arquero'
```

```{ojs}
descriptions = FileAttachment("data/descriptions.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
binsRaw = FileAttachment("data/100bins.csv").csv({ typed: true })
scenarios = aq.from(binsRaw)
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " "),
  })
  .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable != "Status quo"))
  .select("variable")
  .dedupe()
  .array("variable")
```

:::: {.columns .column-page}
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{ojs}
viewof select = Inputs.select(scenarios, {label: "Szenario"})
```
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{ojs}
viewof radio = Inputs.radio(["Frauen", "Männer"], {label: "Geschlecht", value: "Frauen"})
```
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
```{ojs}
viewof range = Inputs.range([100, 4200], {label: "Bruttopension", step: 100})
```
:::
::::

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
info = descriptions
  .filter(d => d.variable == select)
  .map(d => d.description)[0]
```

::: {.columns .column-page .mainText}
![](img/Infobox_info_icon.svg){height=18px} ${info}
:::

```{ojs}
bins = aq.from(binsRaw)
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " "),
    bin: d => d.bin * 100,
    range: aq.escape(d => range),
    radio: aq.escape(d => radio),
  })
```

:::{.column-page}
```{ojs}
distributions = {

  const area = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: "step",
      opacity: 0.44,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
        .axis({
          grid: false,
          title: "Bruttopension"
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 18000],
        })
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
          title: "Anzahl Personen"
        }),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top",
          // legendX: 1000,
          // legendY: 500,
          title: null,
        }),
      // vl.opacity()
      //   .fieldN("gesl")
      //   .scale({
      //     range: radio == "Männer" ? [0.4, 0.7] : [0.7, 0.4],
      //   })
      //   .legend(null),
    )

  const areaLowTail = vl
    .markArea({
      interpolate: "step",
      opacity: 0.5,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin <= datum.range"),
      // vl.filter("datum.gesl == datum.radio"),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("N"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const rule = vl
    .markRule({
      stroke: "black"
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter("datum.bin == datum.range")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("bin")
    )
    
  return vl
    .layer(
      area,
      areaLowTail,
      rule,
    )
    .width(width * 0.16)
    .facet({
      field: "variable", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    .data(
      bins
        .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable == select || d.variable == "Status quo"))
      )
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
```
:::

```{ojs}
cumPerc = bins
  .derive({ 
    tail: aq.escape(
      d => d.bin < range ? "lower" : 
      d.bin > range ? "higher" : "same"
      )
  })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable", "tail"])
  .rollup({ N: d => op.sum(d.N) })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable"])
  .derive({ 
    perc: d => d.N / op.sum(d.N),
  })
  .groupby(["gesl", "variable", "tail"])
  .derive({ 
    text: aq.escape(d => d3.format(",.1~%")(d.perc)),
  })
  .objects()
```

::: {.columns .column-page .mainText}
Etwa ${cumPerc.filter(d => d.gesl == "Frauen" && d.tail == "lower" && d.variable == "Status quo").map(d => d.text)} aller Frauen und ${cumPerc.filter(d => d.gesl == "Männer" && d.tail == "lower" && d.variable == "Status quo").map(d => d.text)} haben im Status quo eine niedrigere Pension als ${range} Euro pro Monat. Für das Szenario
:::

```{ojs}
alleRaw = FileAttachment("data/alle.csv").csv({ typed: true })
alle = aq.from(alleRaw)
  .derive({ 
    variable: d => op.replace(d.variable, /\r\n/g, " "),
    range: aq.escape(d => range),
    radio: aq.escape(d => radio),
  })
alle.objects()
deciles = [
  "Gesamt",
  "10. Dezil",
  "25. Dezil",
  "50. Dezil",
  "75. Dezil",
  "90. Dezil",
]
alle
  .select("D")
  .dedupe()
  .array("D")
```

:::{.column-page}
```{ojs}
bars = {

  const bar = vl
    .markBar({
      stroke: "transparent",
      opacity: 0.7,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldO("D")
        .axis({
          grid: false,
          title: null,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
          title: "Bruttopension",
        }),
      vl.xOffset()
        .fieldN("gesl"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors,
        })
        .legend({
          orient: "top",
          title: null,
        }),
    )

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bar
    )
    .width(width * 0.16)
    .facet({
      field: "val", 
      type: "nominal", 
      title: null,
      header: { 
        labelFontSize: 14, 
        orient: "top",
      },
    })
    .data(
      alle
        .filter(aq.escape(d => d.variable == select && deciles.includes(d.D)))
      )
    .config(config)
    .render({ renderer: "svg" })

}
```
:::
